commands.repair_reason: The remaining blocker is human-supplied latest-head real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the auth-provider visibility tradeoff, not a narrow code repair for automation.; Cleared: No dependency, CI, package, script, or secret-handling changes were found; the auth-related change narrows discovery for a browse path. commands.review_summary:
The PR shares Gateway-style read-only model catalog browse loading with a 750ms fallback, applies it to auto-reply `/models`, disables runtime auth discovery for the static browse visibility pass, and adds focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main’s `/models` path still awaits the full catalog load while Gateway has the fast read-only timeout path, and the linked report includes large LiteLLM timing evidence. I did not run a live LiteLLM reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is human-supplied latest-head real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the auth-provider visibility tradeoff, not a narrow code repair for automation.
